title: Function Types, Parameters, Overloads, and Callable APIs · Compiler Case: Optional Default Rest
summary: Refactor status calculations and adapters into callable contracts that preserve inputs, failures, and return relationships. Planned artifact: Add and verify the ts optional default rest increment in a callable service transformation toolkit. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Model optional, default, rest, tuple-rest, and destructured parameters without ambiguous call shapes.
Reason about callback parameter compatibility under strictFunctionTypes without accepting unsound narrower handlers.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
